---
title: "A History of England from the First Invasion by the Romans to the Revolution in 1688"
---

## A History of England from the First Invasion by the Romans to the Revolution in 1688

**Author:** John Lingard
**Date:** 1819-1830
**Imprint:** London: Mawman

### Notes

The publisher of the later volumes was Baldwin and Cradock.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
